title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Apollo Telehealth - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Apollo Telehealth - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Telehealth invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Apollo Telehealth:
Apollo Telehealth is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth!
